---
title: "Content Collection"
format:
  html:
    theme: none
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| include: false
#| label: setup

library(httr2)
library(jsonlite)

# Source shared rendering helpers. Prefer the local copies that stage_bundle
# placed next to this file; fall back to the configurator's R/ dir for local
# dev rendering of the template before any deploy has been staged.
.source_helper <- function(name) {
  candidates <- c(name, file.path("..", "R", name))
  for (p in candidates) {
    if (file.exists(p)) { source(p); return(invisible(p)) }
  }
  stop(sprintf("Cannot find helper file: %s", name))
}
.source_helper("icons.R")
.source_helper("render.R")

`%||%` <- function(a, b) if (is.null(a) || (length(a) == 1 && is.na(a))) b else a

connect_server  <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_SERVER", "")
connect_api_key <- Sys.getenv("CONNECT_API_KEY", "")

config <- tryCatch(
  jsonlite::read_json("collection.json", simplifyVector = TRUE),
  error = function(e) { message("No collection.json: ", e$message); list() }
)

fetch_content <- function(guid) {
  tryCatch({
    resp <- request(paste0(connect_server, "/__api__/v1/content/", guid)) |>
      req_headers(Authorization = paste("Key", connect_api_key)) |>
      req_url_query(include = "owner") |>
      req_perform()
    resp_body_json(resp)
  }, error = function(e) {
    list(guid = guid, title = guid, description = "",
         app_mode = "unknown", last_deployed_time = "")
  })
}

fetch_content_by_tag <- function(tag_name) {
  tryCatch({
    resp <- request(paste0(connect_server, "/__api__/v1/search/content")) |>
      req_headers(Authorization = paste("Key", connect_api_key)) |>
      req_url_query(
        q = paste0("published:true tag:", tag_name),
        include = "owner",
        page_size = 100
      ) |>
      req_perform()
    resp_body_json(resp)$results %||% list()
  }, error = function(e) list())
}

source_type <- config$source_type %||% "manual"
if (identical(source_type, "tag") && nzchar(config$source_tag %||% "")) {
  items <- fetch_content_by_tag(config$source_tag)
} else {
  items <- lapply(config$guids %||% character(0), fetch_content)
}
```

```{r}
#| echo: false

# Emit raw HTML via htmltools so it bypasses pandoc's markdown processing.
# (`cat(...)` with `results: asis` would let pandoc see the indented lines
# inside our card HTML and treat them as Markdown code blocks, escaping
# everything.)
htmltools::browsable(htmltools::HTML(
  build_collection_html(config, items, THEME_COLORS,
                        connect_server = connect_server)
))
```
